title: Smoky Romantic Irish Salmon Pizza
description: A Mediterranean‑inspired Irish pizza featuring flaky smoked salmon, basil, and feta, finished in a crisp crust for a romantic, smoky bite.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220 °C (428 °F) and the air fryer to 200 °C (392 °F).
Pat the salmon dry and season with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, dried basil, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Air‑fry the salmon for 8–10 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 63 °C (145 °F); remove and gently flake with a fork.
Brush the pre‑made crust lightly with olive oil, then spread shredded mozzarella evenly over the surface.
Top the crust with the flaked salmon, a scattering of capers, and crumbled feta.
Sprinkle with sea salt, pepper, and optional red‑pepper flakes, then add lemon zest and a light squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the crust edges are golden.
Remove from the oven, garnish with fresh basil leaves, drizzle a final splash of olive oil, slice, and serve immediately.
